profiles.purpose: Start with the local caller-skill and MCP development loop.
Evaluate the full product shape on one machine before splitting components.
Prepare and manage the private platform profile.
Review public exposure gates before opening edge routes.
Prepare handoff, audit, backup, restore rehearsal, and rotation evidence.
Follow the public-stack first-use operator path.
Review published-image smoke metadata before running Docker.

safety_defaults: commands catalog is read-only and does not read .env files directly
commands catalog only calls read-only deployability metadata commands
commands catalog does not call Docker, bind ports, or probe network endpoints
JSON output contains command metadata and filters without printing secret values
notes: use this as the searchable command catalog for humans, dashboards, and CI
runtime readiness still belongs to profile-specific doctor, preflight, status, smoke, and audit commands
